title: neltuma piurensis
intro: Neltuma piurensis is a plant species native to the tropical forests of South America, belonging to the family Menispermaceae, and is also known as the "Palo de Cristal" or "Crystal Tree" due to its unique crystalline resin. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health issues such as fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Neltuma piurensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy. Herbal preparations of Neltuma piurensis can be found in various forms, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
